---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)

library(flexclust)
library(parallel)
library(ggplot2)
library(envalysis)

library(ggtext)
library(forcats)  # For reordering factors
library(paletteer)


cl <- makeCluster(2, type = "PSOCK")
clusterCall(cl, function() require("flexclust"))

library(StatMatch)

library(umap)
library(uwot)


library(ggsci)
library(see)
library(cluster)
library(factoextra)

library(tibble)

```
```{r}
#Read in file and remove labels
Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves <- read.csv("D:/Downloads/Drug Stimulated INS1E Cells/CSV_files/Raw_Dist/Filtered_All_Cond_Raw_Unorm_vesicles.csv")
Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves

Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond <- Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves %>% 
  select(-c(Cell, Condition, Mito.Raw.Dist.EDT)) %>%
  filter(`Geometric.Diameter..nm.` != 0) #Remove weird 0 sized diameters 
Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond
```
```{r}
hist(Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond$Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT)

median(
  Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond$Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

mean(
  Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond$Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT,
  na.rm = TRUE
)
```

```{r}
Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond_75 <- Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond
Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond_100 <- Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond
threshold75 = 0
threshold100 = 100
Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond_75$Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT <- ifelse(Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond_75$Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT <= threshold75, 1, 0)
Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond_75$Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT <- as.character(Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond_75$Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT)
Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond_75

Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond_100$Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT <- ifelse(Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond_100$Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT <= threshold100, 1, 0)
Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond_100$Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT <- as.character(Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond_100$Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT)
Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond_100

sum(Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond_75$Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT == "1", na.rm = TRUE)
sum(Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond_100$Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT == "1", na.rm = TRUE)

```

```{r}
#encode binary categories for PM Distances
threshold = 50 
Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond$Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT <- ifelse(Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond$Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT <= threshold, 1, 0)
Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond$Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT <- as.character(Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond$Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT)
Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond

sum(Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond$Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT == "1", na.rm = TRUE)


```
```{r}
#Perform PCA

pca_result_raw <- prcomp(Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond[, -6], center = TRUE, scale. = TRUE)

summary(pca_result_raw)


fviz_eig(pca_result_raw, addlabels = TRUE, ylim = c(0, 100))

```
```{r}
pca_result_raw$rotation
```
```{r}
pca_raw <- as.data.frame(pca_result_raw$x[, 1:3])
pca_raw

pca_raw_conjoined <- pca_raw %>% 
  mutate(PMContact = Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond$Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT)
pca_raw_conjoined
```
```{r}
var_weights_0.025 <- c(1, 1, 1, 0.025)
var_weights_0.05 <- c(1, 1, 1, 0.05)
var_weights_0.1 <- c(1, 1, 1, 0.1)
var_weights_0.25 <- c(1, 1, 1, 0.25)

var_weights_0.5 <- c(1, 1, 1, 0.5)
var_weights_0.75 <- c(1, 1, 1, 0.75)
var_weights_1.0 <- c(1, 1, 1, 1)

#gowers_mat_0.50 <- gower.dist(pca_raw_conjoined, var.weights = var_weights_0.5)

#gowers_mat_0.25 <- gower.dist(pca_raw_conjoined, var.weights = var_weights_0.25)
#gowers_mat_0.1 <- gower.dist(pca_raw_conjoined, var.weights = var_weights_0.1)
gowers_mat_0.05 <- gower.dist(pca_raw_conjoined, var.weights = var_weights_0.05)
#gowers_mat_0.025 <- gower.dist(pca_raw_conjoined, var.weights = var_weights_0.025)

```


```{r}
km_res_full_0.1 <- kcca(gowers_mat_0.1, k = 5, 
  #family = kccaFamily("kmedians")
)
km_res_full_0.1@cluster
```
```{r}
#km_res_full_0.25 <- kcca(gowers_mat_0.25, k = 5, 
#  family = kccaFamily("kmedians")
#  )

#km_res_full_0.1 <- kcca(gowers_mat_0.1, k = 5, 
#  family = kccaFamily("kmedians")
#  )

km_res_full_0.05 <- kcca(gowers_mat_0.05, k = 5, 
  family = kccaFamily("kmedians")
  )

#km_res_full_0.025 <- kcca(gowers_mat_0.025, k = 5, 
#  family = kccaFamily("kmedians")
#  )
```


```{r}
class(km_res_full_0.25)
```

```{r}
#k-medians, final 

km_res_full_0.25 

Cluster_AssignGow_0.25 <- km_res_full_0.25@cluster
#Cluster_assigngow
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.25 <- Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond %>%
   filter(`Geometric.Diameter..nm.` != 0)
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.25 <- FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.25 %>% mutate(Cluster_AssignGow_0.25)
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.25

ClusterGow_0.25 <- FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.25 %>% 
  group_by(Cluster_AssignGow_0.25) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    RatioPMContact = mean(Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT == 1),
    across(where(is.numeric), mean, na.rm = TRUE)
)

ClusterGow_0.25
```

```{r}
#k-medians, final 

km_res_full_0.1

Cluster_AssignGow_0.1 <- km_res_full_0.1@cluster
#Cluster_assigngow
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.1 <- Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond %>%
   filter(`Geometric.Diameter..nm.` != 0)
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.1 <- FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.1 %>% mutate(Cluster_AssignGow_0.1)
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.1

ClusterGow_0.1 <- FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.1 %>% 
  group_by(Cluster_AssignGow_0.1) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    RatioPMContact = mean(Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT == 1),
    across(where(is.numeric), mean, na.rm = TRUE)
)

ClusterGow_0.1
```

```{r}
#k-medians, final 

km_res_full_0.05

Cluster_AssignGow_0.05 <- km_res_full_0.05@cluster
#Cluster_assigngow
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.05 <- Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond %>%
   filter(`Geometric.Diameter..nm.` != 0)
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.05 <- FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.05 %>% mutate(Cluster_AssignGow_0.05)
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.05

ClusterGow_0.05 <- FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.05 %>% 
  group_by(Cluster_AssignGow_0.05) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    RatioPMContact = mean(Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT == 1),
    across(where(is.numeric), mean, na.rm = TRUE)
)

ClusterGow_0.05


```

```{r}
#k-medians, final 

km_res_full_0.025

Cluster_AssignGow_0.025 <- km_res_full_0.025@cluster
#Cluster_assigngow
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.025 <- Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond %>%
   filter(`Geometric.Diameter..nm.` != 0)
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.025 <- FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.025 %>% mutate(Cluster_AssignGow_0.025)
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.025

ClusterGow_0.025 <- FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.025 %>% 
  group_by(Cluster_AssignGow_0.025) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    RatioPMContact = mean(Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT == 1),
    across(where(is.numeric), mean, na.rm = TRUE)
)

ClusterGow_0.025
```

```{r}
#Add cluster assignments to df

Cluster_AssignGow <- km_res_full_0.1@cluster
#Cluster_assigngow
FilterRaw_ClustAssign <- Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond %>%
   filter(`Geometric.Diameter..nm.` != 0)
FilterRaw_ClustAssign <- FilterRaw_ClustAssign %>% mutate(Cluster_AssignGow)
FilterRaw_ClustAssign
```
```{r}
ClusterGow <- FilterRaw_ClustAssign %>% 
  group_by(Cluster_AssignGow) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    RatioPMContact = mean(Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT == 1),
    across(where(is.numeric), mean, na.rm = TRUE)
)

ClusterGow
```


```{r}
Cluster_AssignGow_0.25 <- km_res_full_0.25@cluster
#Cluster_assigngow
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.25 <- Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond %>%
   filter(`Geometric.Diameter..nm.` != 0)
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.25 <- FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.25 %>% mutate(Cluster_AssignGow_0.25)
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.25

ClusterGow_0.25 <- FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.25 %>% 
  group_by(Cluster_AssignGow_0.25) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    RatioPMContact = mean(Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT == 1),
    across(where(is.numeric), mean, na.rm = TRUE)
)

ClusterGow_0.25
```


```{r}
#Only one not valid- used wrong dataset initially 

Cluster_AssignGow_0.50 <- km_res_full_0.50@cluster
#Cluster_assigngow
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.50 <- Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond %>%
   filter(`Geometric.Diameter..nm.` != 0)
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.50 <- FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.50 %>% mutate(Cluster_AssignGow_0.50)
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.50

ClusterGow_0.50 <- FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.50 %>% 
  group_by(Cluster_AssignGow_0.50) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    RatioPMContact = mean(Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT == 1),
    across(where(is.numeric), mean, na.rm = TRUE)
)

ClusterGow_0.50
```

```{r}
Cluster_AssignGow_0.05 <- km_res_full_0.05@cluster
#Cluster_assigngow
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.05 <- Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond %>%
   filter(`Geometric.Diameter..nm.` != 0)
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.05 <- FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.05 %>% mutate(Cluster_AssignGow_0.05)
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.05

ClusterGow_0.05 <- FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.05 %>% 
  group_by(Cluster_AssignGow_0.05) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    RatioPMContact = mean(Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT == 1),
    across(where(is.numeric), mean, na.rm = TRUE)
)

ClusterGow_0.05
```

```{r}
Cluster_AssignGow_0.025 <- km_res_full_0.025@cluster
#Cluster_assigngow
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.025 <- Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond %>%
   filter(`Geometric.Diameter..nm.` != 0)
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.025 <- FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.025 %>% mutate(Cluster_AssignGow_0.025)
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.025

ClusterGow_0.025 <- FilterRaw_ClustAssign_0.025 %>% 
  group_by(Cluster_AssignGow_0.025) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    RatioPMContact = mean(Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT == 1),
    across(where(is.numeric), mean, na.rm = TRUE)
)

ClusterGow_0.025
```

```{r}

#ClusterGow_0.1 <- tibble(
#  Cluster = c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5),
#  n = c(4906, 1118, 3308, 12476, 15098),
#  RatioPMContact = c(0.0000000, 0.2423971, 0.6094317, 0.0000000, 0.0000000),
#  LAC.Value = c(0.3785873, 0.4120842, 0.3219082, 0.3137881, 0.3363374),
#  LAC.Std.Dev = c(0.02653050, 0.04515505, 0.01708459, 0.01457369, 0.01892533),
#  LAC.Skew = c(0.32998327, 0.28929290, -0.04771118, -0.03841677, 0.22595049),
#  LAC.Kurtosis = c(-0.274983811, -0.147133148, -0.007878572, -0.413397219, -0.326156184),
#  Geometric.Diameter..nm. = c(204.1093, 280.6716, 124.8216, 104.9902, 142.5861)
#)
ClusterGow_0.1 <- tibble(
  Cluster = c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5),
  n = c(6496, 11550, 11871, 4441, 2548),
  RatioPMContact = c(0.0000000, 0.0000000, 0.0000000, 0.3386625, 0.3072998),
  LAC.Value = c(0.3664540, 0.3147109, 0.3340143, 0.3140559, 0.3926893),
  LAC.Std.Dev = c(0.02378071, 0.01490126, 0.01860666, 0.01492156, 0.03570580),
  LAC.Skew = c(0.316743366, 0.004826368, 0.208904388, -0.133186246, 0.280564533),
  LAC.Kurtosis = c(-0.2379582, -0.4355989, -0.3509979, -0.1141773, -0.1455166),
  Geometric.Diameter..nm. = c(183.4726, 108.0623, 140.2346, 105.7854, 241.8400)
)

#ClusterGow_0.25 <- tibble(
#  Cluster = c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5),
#  n = c(1554, 2450, 7379, 17896, 7627),
#  RatioPMContact = c(0.0000000, 0.9334694, 0.0000000, 0.0000000, 0.0000000),
#  LAC.Value = c(0.4047743, 0.3370280, 0.3122007, 0.3262605, 0.3643044),
#  LAC.Std.Dev = c(0.03733837, 0.02353840, 0.01378082, 0.01722907, 0.02346935),
#  LAC.Skew = c(0.3130831, 0.1249360, -0.1743647, 0.1562007, 0.3166718),
#  LAC.Kurtosis = c(-0.2277158, -0.2265885, -0.2769019, -0.3821973, -0.2398588),
#  Geometric.Diameter..nm. = c(256.06050, 166.26046, 96.22057, 128.41491, 180.58248)
#)

ClusterGow_0.25 <- tibble(
  Cluster = c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5),
  n = c(13103, 2963, 7484, 3830, 9526),
  RatioPMContact = c(0.0000000, 0.7718529, 0.0000000, 0.0000000, 0.0000000),
  LAC.Value = c(0.3215661, 0.3500464, 0.3123695, 0.3824167, 0.3488009),
  LAC.Std.Dev = c(0.01648408, 0.02708169, 0.01383086, 0.02802918, 0.02074512),
  LAC.Skew = c(0.1158827, 0.1351990, -0.1551397, 0.3566985, 0.2721516),
  LAC.Kurtosis = c(-0.4174066, -0.2130979, -0.2892481, -0.1844904, -0.2781292),
  Geometric.Diameter..nm. = c(122.2428, 185.3150, 96.4616, 210.7523, 158.5921)
)

#ClusterGow_0.025 <- tibble(
#  Cluster = c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5),
#  n = c(11015, 16491, 5285, 724, 3391),
#  RatioPMContact = c(0.06790740, 0.04159845, 0.07057711, 0.10220994, 0.11972869),
#  LAC.Value = c(0.3487746, 0.3192287, 0.3129974, 0.4150758, 0.3877661),
#  LAC.Std.Dev = c(0.02096225, 0.01612127, 0.01369783, 0.04898651, 0.02951917),
#  LAC.Skew = c(0.2736269, 0.1021514, -0.2595174, 0.1790408, 0.3715591),
#  LAC.Kurtosis = c(-0.2720525, -0.4153376, -0.1662886, 0.0273543, -0.2702612),
#  Geometric.Diameter..nm. = c(160.64085, 119.01144, 93.85072, 284.90614, 223.04153)
#)

ClusterGow_0.025 <- tibble(
  Cluster = c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5),
  n = c(1776, 10679, 5366, 12499, 6586),
  RatioPMContact = c(0.11768018, 0.05431220, 0.10454715, 0.03624290, 0.07348922),
  LAC.Value = c(0.3998614, 0.3411722, 0.3710594, 0.3180822, 0.3120907),
  LAC.Std.Dev = c(0.03881468, 0.01977359, 0.02502847, 0.01593634, 0.01383627),
  
  LAC.Skew = c(0.21068368, 0.24632381, 0.34320517, 0.08361356, -0.17837523),
  LAC.Kurtosis = c(-0.02898098, -0.30872220, -0.20907491, -0.43602986, -0.25832520),
  Geometric.Diameter..nm. = c(251.05948, 150.54654, 192.55308, 117.79514, 95.89343)
)

#ClusterGow_0.05 <- tibble(
#  Cluster = c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5),
#  n = c(3421, 751, 5771, 16198, 10765),
#  RatioPMContact = c(0.16515639, 0.13981358, 0.13567839, 0.01284109, 0.05815142),
#  LAC.Value = c(0.3863223, 0.4135017, 0.3124190, 0.3199123, 0.3491609),
#  LAC.Std.Dev = c(0.02933043, 0.04833476, 0.01390574, 0.01615759, 0.02100365),
#  LAC.Skew = c(0.36716291, 0.17847654, -0.21727242, 0.09947784, 0.27580572),
#  LAC.Kurtosis = c(-0.27120196, 0.03693274, -0.17941747, -0.41883561, -0.26955083),
#  Geometric.Diameter..nm. = c(221.49092, 283.37448, 96.18621, 119.19208, 161.11333)
#)

ClusterGow_0.05 <- tibble(
  Cluster = c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5),
  n = c(10281, 11997, 5669, 7093, 1866),
  RatioPMContact = c(0.01741076, 0.00000000, 0.14799788, 0.13661356, 0.16077170),
  LAC.Value = c(0.3415062, 0.3183959, 0.3684918, 0.3119873, 0.3982031),
  LAC.Std.Dev = c(0.01973639, 0.01588191, 0.02468980, 0.01409045, 0.03824150),
  LAC.Skew = c(0.2465324, 0.0779820, 0.3347558, -0.1482183, 0.2143858),
  LAC.Kurtosis = c(-0.31175103, -0.43535381, -0.21790364, -0.26681224, -0.03517176),
  Geometric.Diameter..nm. = c(150.10587, 117.32509, 189.92144, 98.27594, 249.81781)
)

ClusterGow_0.025
ClusterGow_0.05
ClusterGow_0.1
ClusterGow_0.25

#To convery them in graphical form, change to z-score format 
```

```{r}
Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond
#calculate sd and mean for every column 
Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond[,-6]
std_devs <- sapply(Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond[,-6], sd)
means <- sapply(Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond[,-6], mean)

```
```{r}
ClusterGow_0.025[-c(1,2,3)]
std_devs
means
#ClusterGow_0.025
#ClusterGow_0.05
#ClusterGow_0.1
#ClusterGow_0.25

#ClusterGow_0.25_normdf <- as.data.frame(scale(ClusterGow_0.25[-c(1,2,3)], center = means, scale = std_devs)) #%>%
  #mutate(Gow_Cluster = c(1,2,3,4,5))

###weight = 0.25 
recluster_id_0.25 <- c("3" = "1",
                  "1" = "2",
                  "5" = "3",
                  "2" = "4",
                  "4" = "5"
                  )
ClusterGow_0.25_normdf <- ClusterGow_0.25 %>%
  #Normalize variables 
  mutate(
    across(
      -c(1,2,3),
      ~ (.x - means[cur_column()]) / std_devs[cur_column()])) %>%
  mutate(n_pct = 100 * n / sum(n)) %>%
  mutate(Cluster = recode(Cluster, !!!recluster_id_0.25))


###Weight = 0.1  
recluster_id_0.1 <- c("4" = "1",
                  "2" = "2",
                  "3" = "3",
                  "1" = "4",
                  "5" = "5"
                  )
ClusterGow_0.1_normdf <- ClusterGow_0.1 %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      -c(1,2,3),
      ~ (.x - means[cur_column()]) / std_devs[cur_column()])) %>%
  mutate(n_pct = 100 * n / sum(n)) %>%
  mutate(Cluster = recode(Cluster, !!!recluster_id_0.1))

###Weight = 0.05 
recluster_id_0.05 <- c("4" = "1",
                  "2" = "2",
                  "1" = "3",
                  "3" = "4",
                  "5" = "5"
                  )
ClusterGow_0.05_normdf <- ClusterGow_0.05 %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      -c(1,2,3),
      ~ (.x - means[cur_column()]) / std_devs[cur_column()])) %>%
  mutate(n_pct = 100 * n / sum(n)) %>%
  mutate(Cluster = recode(Cluster, !!!recluster_id_0.05))

###weight = 0.025
recluster_id_0.025 <- c("5" = "1",
                  "4" = "2",
                  "2" = "3",
                  "3" = "4",
                  "1" = "5"
                  )
ClusterGow_0.025_normdf <- ClusterGow_0.025 %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      -c(1,2,3),
      ~ (.x - means[cur_column()]) / std_devs[cur_column()]))%>%
  mutate(n_pct = 100 * n / sum(n)) %>%
  mutate(Cluster = recode(Cluster, !!!recluster_id_0.025))

ClusterGow_0.25_normdf
ClusterGow_0.1_normdf
ClusterGow_0.05_normdf
ClusterGow_0.025_normdf
```
```{r}
ClusterGow_0.25_normdf_graph <- ClusterGow_0.25_normdf[-c(2,3,9)] %>% pivot_longer(
    cols = -(c(Cluster)),
    names_to = "Parameter",
    values_to = "Z_Score"
  )
ClusterGow_0.1_normdf_graph <- ClusterGow_0.1_normdf[-c(2,3,9)] %>% pivot_longer(
    cols = -(c(Cluster)),
    names_to = "Parameter",
    values_to = "Z_Score"
  )
ClusterGow_0.05_normdf_graph <- ClusterGow_0.05_normdf[-c(2,3,9)] %>% pivot_longer(
    cols = -(c(Cluster)),
    names_to = "Parameter",
    values_to = "Z_Score"
  )
ClusterGow_0.025_normdf_graph <- ClusterGow_0.025_normdf[-c(2,3,9)] %>% pivot_longer(
    cols = -(c(Cluster)),
    names_to = "Parameter",
    values_to = "Z_Score"
  )

ClusterGow_0.25_normdf_graph
ClusterGow_0.1_normdf_graph
ClusterGow_0.05_normdf_graph
ClusterGow_0.025_normdf_graph
```

```{r}
#Parameter labels 
cust_param_labels_gow <-  c(
    "Mito.Raw.Dist.EDT" = "Distance from Mito",
    "LAC.Value" = "LAC Mean",
    "LAC.Std.Dev" = "LAC Std. Dev.",
    "Geometric.Diameter..nm." = "Granule Diameter",
    "LAC.Skew" = "LAC Skew",
    "LAC.Kurtosis" = "LAC Kurtosis"
  )

facet_labs_0.25 <- c(
  "1" = "Cluster 1 (20% total) <br> 0% Docked",
  "2" = "Cluster 2 (36% total) <br> 0% Docked",
  "3" = "Cluster 3 (26% total) <br> 0% Docked",
  "4" = "Cluster 4 (8% total) <br> **77% Docked**",
  "5" = "Cluster 5 (10% total) <br> 0% Docked"
)

#what parameters to show + order
show_col_gow <- rev(c("LAC.Value", "Geometric.Diameter..nm.", "LAC.Std.Dev", "LAC.Skew"))

#ggplot
Gow_bar_0.25 <- ggplot(ClusterGow_0.25_normdf_graph, 
                          aes(x = Parameter, 
                              y = Z_Score, 
                              fill = Cluster
                              )) +
#graph logic
  geom_col(aes(y = Z_Score - (-1) )) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) x + (-1),
                     breaks = c(0,0.5,1,1.5,2,2.5,3,3.5),
                     limits = c(0, NA),        # Start from 0, auto upper limit
                     expand = c(0, 0) 
                     ) +
  
  facet_wrap(~Cluster, nrow = 1, labeller = as_labeller(facet_labs_0.25)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = cust_param_labels_gow, limits = show_col_gow) +
  coord_flip() +
  
  scale_fill_okabeito() +

#graph design
  guides(fill = FALSE) +
  labs(y = "Z-Score", x = "") + 
  theme_publish() +
  
  theme(
    #strip.background = element_rect(fill = "bisque"),
    strip.text.x = element_markdown(size = rel(1.65), hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = rel(2), hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = rel(1.5)),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = rel(1.5)),
    #plot.margin = margin(5.5, 11.0, 5.5, 5.5)
  ) 

Gow_bar_0.25
```
```{r}
facet_labs_0.1 <- c(
  "1" = "Cluster 1 (12% total) <br> **34% Docked**",
  "2" = "Cluster 2 (31% total) <br> 0% Docked",
  "3" = "Cluster 3 (32% total) <br> 0% Docked",
  "4" = "Cluster 4 (18% total) <br> 0% Docked",
  "5" = "Cluster 5 (7% total) <br> **30% Docked**"
)

facet_labs_0.05 <- c(
  "1" = "Cluster 1 (19% total) <br> **14% Docked**",
  "2" = "Cluster 2 (33% total) <br> 0% Docked",
  "3" = "Cluster 3 (28% total) <br> **2% Docked**",
  "4" = "Cluster 4 (15% total)  <br> **15% Docked**",
  "5" = "Cluster 5 (5% total) <br> **16% Docked**"
)

facet_labs_0.025 <- c(
  "1" = "Cluster 1 (18% total) <br> **7% Docked**",
  "2" = "Cluster 2 (34% total) <br> **4% Docked**",
  "3" = "Cluster 3 (29% total) <br> **5% Docked**",
  "4" = "Cluster 4 (15% total)  <br> **10% Docked**",
  "5" = "Cluster 5 (5% total) <br> **12% Docked**"
)

Gow_bar_0.1 <- Gow_bar_0.25 %+% ClusterGow_0.1_normdf_graph + facet_wrap(~Cluster, nrow = 1, labeller = as_labeller(facet_labs_0.1)) 
Gow_bar_0.05 <- Gow_bar_0.25 %+% ClusterGow_0.05_normdf_graph + facet_wrap(~Cluster, nrow = 1, labeller = as_labeller(facet_labs_0.05)) 
Gow_bar_0.025 <- Gow_bar_0.25 %+% ClusterGow_0.025_normdf_graph + facet_wrap(~Cluster, nrow = 1, labeller = as_labeller(facet_labs_0.025)) 

Gow_bar_0.1
Gow_bar_0.05
Gow_bar_0.025
```

```{r}
ggsave("Gow_bar_0.25_rev.png", plot = Gow_bar_0.25, width = 20, height = 4, dpi = 1000, bg = "White")
ggsave("Gow_bar_0.1_rev.png", plot = Gow_bar_0.1, width = 20, height = 4, dpi = 1000, bg = "White")
ggsave("Gow_bar_0.05_rev.png", plot = Gow_bar_0.05, width = 20, height = 4, dpi = 1000, bg = "White")
ggsave("Gow_bar_0.025_rev.png", plot = Gow_bar_0.025, width = 20, height = 4, dpi = 1000, bg = "White")

```


```{r}
#Adding final cluster assignments to df

Cluster_AssignGow <- km_res_full_0.05@cluster
#Cluster_assigngow
FilterRaw_ClustAssign <- Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves %>%
   select(-c(Cell, Mito.Raw.Dist.EDT)) %>%
   filter(`Geometric.Diameter..nm.` != 0)
FilterRaw_ClustAssign <- FilterRaw_ClustAssign %>% mutate(Cluster_AssignGow)
#Binary encoding
threshold = 50 
FilterRaw_ClustAssign$Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT <- ifelse(Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond$Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT <= threshold, 1, 0)
FilterRaw_ClustAssign$Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT <- as.character(Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves_CellCond$Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT)
FilterRaw_ClustAssign

###Re-id columns, normalize values, select only relevant docked subclusters 
recluster_id_0.05_custom <- c("5" = "1", #14
                  "4" = "2", #0%
                  "2" = "3", #2%
                  "3" = "4", #15
                  "1" = "5" #16%
                  )
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_norm_reid <- FilterRaw_ClustAssign %>%
  filter(substr(as.character(Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT), 1, 1) == "1") %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      c(1,2,3,4,5),
      ~ (.x - means[cur_column()]) / std_devs[cur_column()])) %>%
  mutate(Cluster_AssignGow = recode(Cluster_AssignGow, !!!recluster_id_0.05_custom)) %>%
  select(-Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT) %>%
  filter(!Cluster_AssignGow %in% c(2, 3))

FilterRaw_ClustAssign_norm_reid

#Long format
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_norm_reid_long <- FilterRaw_ClustAssign_norm_reid %>% group_by(Cluster_AssignGow) %>%
  select(-c(Condition)) %>%
  summarise(
    #n = n(),
    across(where(is.numeric), mean, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -(c(Cluster_AssignGow)),
    names_to = "Parameter",
    values_to = "Z_Score"
  ) %>%
  rename(Cluster = Cluster_AssignGow)
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_norm_reid_long
```
```{r}
facet_labs_docked <- c(
  "1" = "Docked Class 1 <br> (46%)",
  "4" = "Docked Class 2 <br> (40%)",
  "5" = "Docked Class 3 <br> (14%)"
)
Dockedbar_0.05 <- Gow_bar_0.25 %+% FilterRaw_ClustAssign_norm_reid_long + facet_wrap(~Cluster, nrow = 1, labeller = as_labeller(facet_labs_docked))+ theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = rel(1.6), hjust = 0.5))
   
Dockedbar_0.05

ggsave("Dockedbar_bar_rev.png", plot = Dockedbar_0.05, width = 10.5, height = 4, dpi = 1000, bg = "White")

#5 = 300 (14%), 4 = 839 (40%), 1 = 969(46%)
```

```{r}
#Conditions (used for some sort of parameter determination)
#Code has some issues tbh 

FilterRaw_ClustAssign
#Same as earlier, but resample to normalize for number of granules 
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_norm_reid_adjust <- FilterRaw_ClustAssign %>%
  
  #norm for number of granules
  
  #group_by(Condition) %>%
  #slice_sample(n = 2000) %>%
  #ungroup() %>%
  
  #re-id, normalize, etc. 
  filter(substr(as.character(Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT), 1, 1) == "1") %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      c(1,2,3,4,5),
      ~ (.x - means[cur_column()]) / std_devs[cur_column()])) %>%
  mutate(Cluster_AssignGow = recode(Cluster_AssignGow, !!!recluster_id_0.05_custom)) %>%
  select(-Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT) %>%
  filter(!Cluster_AssignGow %in% c(2, 3))

FilterRaw_ClustAssign_norm_reid_adjust

#Summarize 
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_norm_reid_Cond_long <- FilterRaw_ClustAssign_norm_reid_adjust %>%
  group_by(Condition, Cluster_AssignGow) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    across(where(is.numeric), mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(percentage = n / sum(n) * 100)


FilterRaw_ClustAssign_norm_reid_Cond_long
```
```{r}
#Conditions (Used for counts)

FilterRaw_ClustAssign
#Same as earlier, but resample to normalize for number of granules 
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_norm_reid_adjust <- FilterRaw_ClustAssign %>%
  #remove irrelevant columns 
  select(-c("LAC.Value", "LAC.Std.Dev", "LAC.Skew", "LAC.Kurtosis", "Geometric.Diameter..nm.")) %>%
  
  #norm for number of granules
  group_by(Condition) %>%
  slice_sample(n = 2000) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  #filter out greater than 50 nm ISGs
  mutate(Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT = as.numeric(Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT)) %>%
  filter(Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT <= 50) %>%
  select(-c(Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT)) %>%

  #re-id, normalize, etc. 
  mutate(Cluster_AssignGow = recode(Cluster_AssignGow, !!!recluster_id_0.05_custom)) %>%
  filter(!Cluster_AssignGow %in% c(2, 3))

FilterRaw_ClustAssign_norm_reid_adjust

#Summarize 
FilterRaw_ClustAssign_norm_reid_Cond_long <- FilterRaw_ClustAssign_norm_reid_adjust %>%
  group_by(Condition, Cluster_AssignGow) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    across(where(is.numeric), mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(percentage = n / sum(n) * 100)


FilterRaw_ClustAssign_norm_reid_Cond_long
```


```{r}
facet_condition_labels <- c(
  "No Stim" = "No Stim",
  "Glucose" = "Glucose",
  "GLM" = "GLM",
  "GKA" = "GKA",
  "TAK" = "TAK",
  "GIP" = "GIP",
  "EXT" = "Ex-4"  # <-- This changes just this one
)

#ggplot
GowerCond_Shifts <- ggplot(FilterRaw_ClustAssign_norm_reid_Cond_long, aes(x = Cluster_AssignGow, y = percentage, fill = Cluster_AssignGow)) +

#Graph logic
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  facet_wrap(~ fct_relevel(Condition, "No Stim", "Glucose", "GLM", "GKA", "TAK", "GIP", "EXT"), nrow = 2, 
              labeller = as_labeller(facet_condition_labels), axes = "all_x"
              ) +
  scale_fill_okabeito() +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
 scale_x_discrete(labels = c("1","2","3")) +

#Graph design 
  guides(fill = "none") +
  theme_publish() +
  labs(x = "Docked Classes", y = "Percentage") +
  theme(
    #strip.background = element_rect(fill = "bisque"),
   strip.text.x = element_markdown(size = rel(2), hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = rel(2.2), hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = rel(2.2)),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = rel(2.2)),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = rel(2.2)),
    plot.margin = margin(5.5, 5.5, 5.5, 20)
  ) 


GowerCond_Shifts

#ggsave("test_GowerCond_Shifts_rev.png", plot = GowerCond_Shifts, width = 12, height = 7, dpi = 1000, bg = "White")

```

```{r}
#Make sure cluster assignments are correct! 

Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves

#Using error bars 
EB_FilterRaw_ClustAssign <- Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves %>%
  select(-Mito.Raw.Dist.EDT) %>%
  filter(`Geometric.Diameter..nm.` != 0) %>%
  mutate(Cluster_AssignGow = Cluster_AssignGow)


#Conditions (Used for counts)

EB_FilterRaw_ClustAssign
#Same as earlier, but resample to normalize for number of granules 
EB_FilterRaw_ClustAssign_norm_reid_adjust <- EB_FilterRaw_ClustAssign %>%
  #remove irrelevant columns 
  select(-c("LAC.Value", "LAC.Std.Dev", "LAC.Skew", "LAC.Kurtosis", "Geometric.Diameter..nm.")) %>%
  
  #norm for number of granules
  group_by(Condition) %>%
  slice_sample(n = 2000) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  #filter out greater than 50 nm ISGs
  mutate(Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT = as.numeric(Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT)) %>%
  filter(Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT <= 50) %>%
  select(-c(Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT)) %>%
  
  #re-id, normalize, etc. 
  mutate(Cluster_AssignGow = recode(Cluster_AssignGow, !!!recluster_id_0.05_custom)) %>%
  filter(!Cluster_AssignGow %in% c(2, 3))

  
EB_FilterRaw_ClustAssign_norm_reid_adjust

#Summarize 
EB_FilterRaw_ClustAssign_norm_reid_Cond_long <- EB_FilterRaw_ClustAssign_norm_reid_adjust %>%
  group_by(Condition, Cluster_AssignGow, Cell) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    across(where(is.numeric), mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(percentage = n / sum(n) * 100)


EB_FilterRaw_ClustAssign_norm_reid_Cond_long
```
```{r}
############################################
okabeito <- c(
  "#E69F00",
  "#56B4E9",
  "#009E73"
)

okabeito_dark <- c(
  "#B67E00",
  "#2F8BC0",
  "#007A59"
)

#ggplot
facet_condition_labels <- c(
  "No Stim" = "No Stim",
  "Glucose" = "Glucose",
  "GLM" = "GLM",
  "GKA" = "GKA",
  "TAK" = "TAK",
  "GIP" = "GIP",
  "EXT" = "Ex-4"
)

GowerCond_Shifts_EB <- ggplot(
  EB_FilterRaw_ClustAssign_norm_reid_Cond_long,
  aes(x = Cluster_AssignGow, y = percentage)
) +

  # Mean bars
  stat_summary(
    fun = mean,
    geom = "bar",
    aes(fill = Cluster_AssignGow),
    width = 0.8
  ) +

  # Error bars: mean ± SEM
  stat_summary(
    fun.data = mean_se,
    geom = "errorbar",
    aes(colour = Cluster_AssignGow),
    width = 0.2,
    linewidth = 1.4
  ) +

  facet_wrap(
    ~ fct_relevel(
        Condition,
        "No Stim", "Glucose", "GLM", "GKA", "TAK", "GIP", "EXT"
      ),
    nrow = 2,
    labeller = as_labeller(facet_condition_labels),
    axes = "all_x"
  ) +

  scale_fill_okabeito() +
  scale_colour_manual(values = okabeito_dark) +
  
  #Make sure region of the graph is good here! 
  scale_y_continuous(
  expand = expansion(
    add = c(0, 0.05 * max(EB_FilterRaw_ClustAssign_norm_reid_Cond_long$percentage))
  )
  ) +

  
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("1", "2", "3")) +

  guides(fill = "none", colour = "none") +
  theme_publish() +
  labs(x = "Docked Classes", y = "Percentage of all Docked ISGs") +
  theme(
    strip.text.x  = element_markdown(size = rel(2), hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x  = element_text(size = rel(2.2), hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.y  = element_text(size = rel(2.2)),
    axis.text.x   = element_text(size = rel(2.2)),
    axis.text.y   = element_text(size = rel(2.2)),
    plot.margin   = margin(5.5, 5.5, 5.5, 20)
  )

GowerCond_Shifts_EB

ggsave("EB_GowerCond_Shifts_rev.png", plot = GowerCond_Shifts_EB, width = 12, height = 7, dpi = 1000, bg = "White")

```

```{r}
Cluster_AssignGow

```

```{r}
#save cluster assignments 
write.csv(
  data.frame(Cluster_AssignGow = Cluster_AssignGow),
  file = "Cluster_AssignGow_0.05.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves
#PERMANOVA dataframe

#Steps 1 including cells
GowerPERMANOVA <- Filter_Raw_Unnorm_Ves %>%
  filter(`Geometric.Diameter..nm.` != 0) %>%
  select(-c("LAC.Value", "LAC.Std.Dev", "LAC.Skew", "LAC.Kurtosis", "Geometric.Diameter..nm.", "Mito.Raw.Dist.EDT")) 
GowerPERMANOVA <- GowerPERMANOVA %>% mutate(Cluster_AssignGow)
GowerPERMANOVA

#Steps 1.5 
GowerPERMANOVA_int <- GowerPERMANOVA %>%
  filter(Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT <= 50) %>%
  select(-c(Min.Raw.Distance.to.PM.EDT)) 
GowerPERMANOVA_int

#Step 2 grouping appropriately 
GowerPERMANOVA_group <- GowerPERMANOVA_int %>%
  #Group together things
  group_by(Cell, Condition, Cluster_AssignGow) %>%
  #group by all parameters (cell, condition, cluster) and then summarise
  summarise(TotalValue = n(), .groups = "drop") 
GowerPERMANOVA_group

#step 3 
GowerPERMANOVA_group_wide <- GowerPERMANOVA_group %>%
  #Correct formatting for NMDS  
  pivot_wider(
      names_from = Cluster_AssignGow, 
      values_from = TotalValue
  )
#fill in N/A as zeros 
GowerPERMANOVA_group_wide[is.na(GowerPERMANOVA_group_wide)] <- 0
GowerPERMANOVA_group_wide


GowerPERMANOVA_group_wide_nmds <- GowerPERMANOVA_group_wide%>%
  select(-c("Cell", "Condition")) %>%
  as.data.frame()
GowerPERMANOVA_group_wide_nmds

GowerPERMANOVA_group_wide_ratio <- (GowerPERMANOVA_group_wide_nmds / rowSums(GowerPERMANOVA_group_wide_nmds)) * 100 
GowerPERMANOVA_group_wide_ratio
```
```{r}
NMDS_res_gower <- metaMDS(GowerPERMANOVA_group_wide_ratio, distance = "bray")

nmds_scores_gow <- as.data.frame(scores(NMDS_res_gower)$sites) 
nmds_scores_gow_cond <- nmds_scores_gow %>%
  mutate(
  Condition = GowerPERMANOVA_group_wide$Condition
  )
nmds_scores_gow_cond

ggplot(nmds_scores_gow_cond, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, color = Condition)) +
  geom_point()
```
```{r}
#Dispersion?
#Distance Matrix

perm_dist_gow <-vegdist(GowerPERMANOVA_group_wide_ratio, method='bray')


#Assumptions

dispersion_gow<-betadisper(perm_dist_gow, group=nmds_scores_gow_cond$Condition,type = "centroid")

plot(dispersion_gow)

anova(dispersion_gow)

TukeyHSD(dispersion_gow)

```
```{r}
#PERMANOVA test
Perma_result_gow<-adonis2( perm_dist~as.factor(nmds_scores_gow_cond$Condition), data=perm_dist_gow,
                       permutations=9999)

Perma_result_gow
```
```{r}
pairwise_results_gow <- pairwise.adonis2(
  perm_dist ~ Condition,
  data = nmds_scores_gow_cond,
  permutations = 9999,
  p.adjust.m = "BH"  # optional, if supported in your version
)
pairwise_results_gow
```




Add a new chunk by clicking the *Insert Chunk* button on the toolbar or by pressing *Ctrl+Alt+I*.

When you save the notebook, an HTML file containing the code and output will be saved alongside it (click the *Preview* button or press *Ctrl+Shift+K* to preview the HTML file).

The preview shows you a rendered HTML copy of the contents of the editor. Consequently, unlike *Knit*, *Preview* does not run any R code chunks. Instead, the output of the chunk when it was last run in the editor is displayed.
